llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The final property solution lists the property as 'High Park Family Home'. This name does not appear exactly in the ground-truth ratings list, so I need to identify the closest match based on type, size, and price. The High Park Family Home is a detached house, 140m², 3 bed / 2 bath, priced at CAD $810,000. In the ground truth purchase_properties list, the 'Family House' matches the size (140m²) and type, though its price is CAD $650K. Since it is the only 140m² family-oriented house, I conclude 'High Park Family Home' maps to 'Family House'. For financing, the solution specifies 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage', which exactly matches 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing. For legal_services, 'Premium Legal Package' exactly matches under essential_legal_services. For moving_services, 'Standard Moving' matches exactly under moving_services. For setup_services, 'Premium Utilities' matches exactly under utility_setup. Thus, mapping is:
- High Park Family Home -> Family House (rating 10)
- First-Time Buyer Mortgage -> First-Time Buyer (rating 10)
- Premium Legal Package -> Premium Legal Package (rating 9)
- Standard Moving -> Standard Moving (rating 8)
- Premium Utilities -> Premium Utilities (rating 9)
